strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across software, hardware, and infrastructure
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework contributions at re:cinq
Proven entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GISCollective platform used by real-world NGOs
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud AI platform strategy or product leadership at director level
Lack of documented AI/ML model development or production-grade AI-powered platforms
No advanced degree (Master’s/PhD) in AI-related field, and limited evidence of AI research
response.justification: The candidate has 15+ years of engineering experience and recent direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), satisfying the core AI engineering requirement; however, there is no evidence of strategic cloud product roadmap leadership, customer advisory in AI adoption, or formal AI education, which are critical for a director-level AI strategy role. His entrepreneurial open-source work is a strength but does not substitute for enterprise AI platform ownership.
